job_summary: Merge is the leading provider of agentic tools and customer-facing integrations for frontier LLMs, Fortune 500 organizations, and B2B SaaS companies. They are hiring backend and full stack engineers to join their San Francisco based engineering teams, focusing on building infrastructure and developing new products using applied AI and large language models.
